priceLines: AUTO-RENEWAL: Your subscription automatically renews at $28.80/month after your 7-day trial until canceled.

I agree to pay $1.98 today for a 7-day Premium trial. Unless canceled, my subscription will automatically renew at $28.80/month starting July 26, 2026, and continue monthly until canceled. I can cancel anytime before my next billing date via my profile settings,  Cancel Subscription  , or  support@iqbrainpro.com .
